entry.title: Re: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content: You don't need to upgrade the SAP GUI version. Download SCR LEGACY TEXT EDITOR GUI7.60 and install it.

entry.title: Re: How to Create And Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Cl...

Hi,

In the screenshot, you have enabled usage for CDS Views I_SLSPRCGCNDNRECDTEMPLATE and I_SLSPRCGCNDNRECDVALIDITYTP_2, so I think you can use these CDS Views to search in Customer Data Browser and check custom field's value.

Best Regards,

Zhehui

entry.title: Re: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content: I am certain that applying this patch can solve the issue of smartforms not displaying, as versions 740  above do not come with pre installed scripts, and since you are 760, smartforms cannot be displayed.

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman
entry.content:
Hi @ramiz_sipai 

The "Unexpected HTTP Status code 502 for API action - Submit " error during the submission process likely indicates that your JWT token has expired. To resolve this issue, please generate a new token.

Thanks and Regards

Mahesh Varma

Besides, why the picking status is “not yet picked” in the outbound delivery but the output status of “delivery picking list” is still shown as “completed”? How to release the output status, so the changes update can also be reflected in the output document?

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with SAP BW Request Housekeeping
entry.content: Thankz Frank!

entry.title: Re: Groovy Script for removing reserved character inside...
entry.content:
Example XML body with reserved characters - 

<employees>

    <employee>
        <id>EMP123</id>
        <name>John *Doe%</name>
        <email>john.doe@:company.com</email>
        <department>Sales & Marketing</department>
        <role>Manager#</role>
        <address>1234 Elm Street; Apt [5B]</address>
        <phone>(555) 123-4567</phone>
        <notes>Key account handler | VIP clients</notes>
    </employee>
</employees>


Groovy script to remove all reserved characters and keep the XML structure intact.

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import java.util.regex.Pattern

def Message processData(Message message) {
    def body = message.getBody(String)
    
    // Define reserved characters and pattern
    def reservedChars = ['*', '%', '?', ':', ';', '=', '(', ')', '[', ']', '|', '#', '@']
    def pattern = reservedChars.collect { Pattern.quote(it) }.join('|')

    // Function to clean reserved characters from XML content
    def cleanContent = { content ->
        return content.replaceAll(pattern, '')
    }

    // Replace reserved characters in XML content manually
    def cleanedBody = body.replaceAll(/(<[^>]+>)([^<]*)(<\/[^>]+>)/) { match ->
        def startTag = match[1]
        def content = match[2]
        def endTag = match[3]
        return startTag + cleanContent(content) + endTag
    }

    // Set cleaned XML body
    message.setBody(cleanedBody)
    return message
}

entry.title: Re: Order not found or goods movement is not permitted in process order in PP-EWM embedded 2022.
entry.content: I have same issue with production order(CO01), have you resolved ?

entry.title: Post recent SAC upgrade, getting below error while opening report.
entry.content:
Preview
Post recent SAC upgrade, getting below error while opening report.
How to fix it?
[Application Error]:Converting circular structure to JSON
--> starting at object with constructor 'n'
| property 'children' -> object with constructor 'Array'
| index 0 -> object with constructor 'n'
--- property 'parent' closes the circle
Correlation ID: 37378367-4581-4604-b232-089496631124

entry.title: Re: Talent Modules Implementation withouth EC
entry.content: Here are my two cents about your question in regards to Compensation (Comp calculation cannot be used). I believe the document is referring to the setup of the Comp Information portlet of EC which can sometimes have calculations (business rules) in it.

entry.title: Re: Sales order with discount amount at header level
entry.content:
Hi,

You may try creating a customizing condition type with the following properties:

  • Control Data 1
    Condition Class: A (Discount or Surcharge)
    Plus/Minus: (positive and negative)
    Calculation Type: B (Fixed Amount)
  • Changes which can be made
    Manual Entries: (No limitations)
    Amount/Percent: checked
    Header Condition: checked
    Delete: checked

Assign the customizing condition type to the customizing pricing procedure with necessary adjustment considering your business logic of price calculations.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Thank you very much, that was a very wonderful and warm welcome.

My name is Sarosh Faheem, I'm from Karachi, Pakistan I reside near the airport, It's been a year since I've been a part of the SAP Community, but still Feel like New when talking about SAP Technology. This Platform is a great place, to build networks and get help and assistance while working on SAP Projects. Like I'm currently doing. Other than This, Although My Background is on the Non-Technical Side, but still focus on acquiring the skills and knowledge of SAP Technology. both as a Functional and ABAP Consultant Since My background is in Business. but planning to harbor ABAP on BTP specifically in SAP Build And Generative AI Stuff Since I have quite enough knowledge about Developing as well as of AI Stuff since I've been certified in it. So. To Market this product in an effective manner. since I've been a Expert Digital Marketer as well for 2 years in the past. before stepping into the World of SAP Technology. So I'm On the Search of a Pathway to Learn SAP both as Functional and ABAP side as well. So Looking forward to connect with all Expert and New Joined Like me. To build each other Strong. Thank you for Giving us the Opportunity to Introduce ourselves. Appreciate that.

When XML is set as the output format of the print queue, the print queue (XML) cannot be selected when the output type of PO is selected from the output parameter determination application. In other words, can't I print OR locally save the document as XML?

It means that the issue is fixed in 10.0 SP 2311.

entry.title: Re: Convert fields to upper case - Report Storie

Hi @Jhonatan ,

In Query design calculated column section there is a Function called Uppercase(), which you can use to convert a field from Lower to upper or vice versa

Regards,

Subbu

entry.title: Re: Post recent SAC upgrade, getting below error while opening report.
entry.content: Please create an incident to SAP on this. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: YTD Calculation in SAC Excel Add in Using GETDATA()
entry.content:
@Hussha 

GETDATA() only supports single member for each dimension member. You cannot pass a range or multiple members. If your requirement is to calculate YTD, its better you create a  calculated measure in the model itself and then use that to report. You would need a calculated measure for each account/measure whose YTD you need. If you want to do the excel based calculation you would have to get data for each month using GETDATA() ands then sum it based on conditions may be in a SUMIFS.

Currently there is no option to create a  calculated measure inn Excel Add-in.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Technology, Travels & Tales: Learning for Life Through Exploration

entry.title: GRC Tuesdays: What's New in SAP solutions for International Trade Management
entry.content:
Expending on the regular “What’s New in GRC” blog series, I’d like to focus this post on SAP solutions for International Trade. If you are not yet familiar with this pillar of SAP’s Governance, Risk, and Compliance portfolio, then I’d suggest having a look at a blog published some time ago – What really is SAP Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC)? – Focus on the International Trade Management pillar – it introduces the 3 products that compose this area: SAP Global Trade Services, SAP S/4HANA for international trade, and last but certainly not least, SAP Watch List Screening.

There are regular innovations released on all solutions of course, but today I want to provide an update specifically regarding SAP Watch List Screening since Product Management, working with Engineering, have delivered a long-awaited capability: the integration with the SAP Business Partner module in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

 

Integration of SAP Watch List Screening with business partner master data in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

 

This enhancement is an answer to direct customer feedback who wanted the screening of their business partners to be more automated and effortless. But also more proactive.

With SAP S4HANA Cloud 2408, SAP Watch List Screening is now integrated with the Business Partner module. Organizations can therefore now screen customers or suppliers master data for natural persons or organizations that might be listed as sanctioned parties.

With this integration, when a business partner is created or changed within the “Customer” or “Supplier” categories, their names and addresses are automatically screened in the background by SAP Watch List Screening. The screening results are then shown in the business partner status. Should a match be retrieved, an investigation record is created in SAP Watch List Screening and an indication that a decision is pending is displayed in the business partner master data in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Once a screening specialist has reviewed the investigation record and decided on whether this is a true hit or a false positive, the record in the Cloud ERP is automatically released or continues to be blocked. This information is of course updated and displayed in the business partner master data, for the sales or purchasing colleagues.

Further, when an already screened business partner is used in a trade compliance document (for instance inbound or outbound delivery, sales or purchase contract, sales quotation, etc.), the result of the original screening can be re-used or a new, additional, screening can be executed. Depending on what has been set in the configurations.

Overview of the Business Partner integration:

 

New apps for ad-hoc screening, reviewing hits and managing automated decisions

In addition to the integration with Business Partner, 3 new SAP Fiori apps have also been released:

 

Ad Hoc Screening

With this app, users can manually screen names and addresses against entries in a sanctioned party list. Results are then delivered immediately. There will be no publication or persistence of the ad hoc screening hits, so this is really designed for one-off screening such as for simulation purposes or to check visitors for instance.

When the user opens the app, they can choose to screen a single name and address or a whole list at once.

 

 

 

 

Review Screening Hits

With this app, users can get an overview of names that have been screened during a business transaction, where there was a match on a watch or sanctions list. They can then review the hits and decide whether the screened names constitute a true hit or a false positive. When a decision is made, it will trigger the release or block of the associated business objects.

 

Manage Automatic Screening Decisions

With this app, users can get an overview on all automatic screening decisions. They can then change decisions for future hits or deactivate decisions. This is quite crucial since these “learnings” then inform how the intelligent screening algorithm will apply in the future. Note: if you are interested in learning more about the intelligent screening topic, we have released a blog post on this capability a few weeks back.

 

 

How do you get access to these new apps?

 

These new apps have been designed to enhance user experience with more robust features, a streamlined interface and context-sensitive help. They will eventually replace the previous apps so, if you have been using the old ones, we recommend you migrate your users.

Thankfully, the SAP colleagues have put together a migration guide available in the SAP Help Portal. For your convenience, I have summarized below the key steps:

  • Subscribe to the new application.
  • Create new role collections or adapt your existing role collections.
  • Launch the new application URL & verify that the new apps are visible on the launchpad.
  • Inform your users about the changes and the new URL.
  • Once the new apps are used in your organization, unsubscribe the old apps.
  • That's it!

Should you be interested in reading more details about all these new capabilities, then I would recommend the following sources:

  • What's New in SAP Watch List Screening | SAP Help Portal
  • Watch List Screening: New Feature 'Business Partner Screening' | SAP Help Portal
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series - Governance, Risk and Compliance – Note: if you are having issues accessing this content, please refer to the dedicated blog that includes details about the sign-up process

I look forward to reading your thoughts and comments either on this blog or on Twitter @TFrenehard

And if you are interested in learning more about SAP solutions for Governance, Risk, and Compliance, feel free to fill-in the demo request form!

entry.title: Fiscal year variant mandatory
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

We observed that a material from plant A, maintaining fiscal year variant which we maintain in MRP3 is not mandatory. But for another material from plant B, it is mandatory. 

Please suggest on what basis system makes this field mandatory? 

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Change printer for goods issue in MB1A
entry.content:
When posting a goods issue with transaction MB1A (movement type 221), a collective goods issue slip (output type WA03) is sent directly to the printer.
A new printer has been created in transaction SPAD, which should to print the goods issue slips in future.
Where do I have to change the printer so that the goods issue slips come out on the new printer?

Environment:
- Parameter NDR in transaction SU01 is set for the printing users
- In the "Defaults" in SU01, the correct printer is set for some users and a completely different one for others -> This setting has no effect.

Where to change the printer for the goods issue in MB1A?

entry.title: Re: Direct Asset G/L posting to correct entries
entry.content: Hi, As long as the 'reconciliation' has revealed the reason for the difference and you post at the asset level, OAMK can be used. Otherwise, at a later stage it is not explicable by just looking at the asset records.

entry.title: Re: Getting error with SF-OCN integration

entry.title: Re: Display XML data for output forms in public cloud for...
entry.content: Hi @Jan - "?DownloadXML=true" is for "Create Correspondence App" whereas as I said earlier in my question we can use #&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&# for gui based output. Now for certificate, payment advice, check and other output that comes directly from std. app I haven't came across any code yet.

entry.title: Re: Task Checklist Observer Comments Section Required
entry.content: We use task checklists with notes and comments but haven't found a way to make this required. As we have a small set of authorised instructors for them they know what they need to complete

entry.title: Fields for People DPI missing
entry.content:
Hi there,

Currently I am designing a Workflow in a custom CPE Environment where I harmonize the HR data for the headcount, injury,... DPIs. After the calculation I want to write the data for the measure PPL_HEADCOUNT into the people DPI (Connection: SAP_SCT_SRC_PEOPLE).

But for the measure to be complete, I also need a field for the "working time" (ID_WORKING_TIME).

Am I using the wrong connection or is there a workaround?

 

Kind regards,

AH

 

SAP Sustainability Control Tower

entry.title: Re: Invoicing in SAP Ariba
entry.content: Thank you @Learner4Life. Aim is to have all relevant info at one place to save time & efforts for everyone 🙂

entry.title: Re: Bring the data from Azure DataBricks (ADB) to SAP ABA...
entry.content:
Yes, the accelerator code on the ABAP SDK is aimed at connecting to Azure services for pull based approaches. That was the first request on your list. Connection direction does not mean you cannot get the data. The SDK is pull-oriented but of course its code can be used for push-based too. You may connect to ADB REST api for instance and handle Managed Identities, Entra ID authentication flows etc out-of-the-box from ABAP.

Push based approaches require a completely different stack with transformations and coding your receiver on ABAP. And we haven't started discussing retry logic and mass data movement yet 😄 at that point a thread of comments is no longer suitable to arrive at a sustainable solution.

entry.title: SAP Payroll
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am having 6+ years in SAP payroll (End User) & I would like to learn & get certified from SAP for Payroll management.

Kindly guide which one certification would be the best for my payroll knowledge. Need your suggestion to improve my skills & ladder to my career.

Thanks.
HCM Payroll SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Re: Creating Quality Notification via BAPI
entry.content:
Yes, I achieved my goal using the following function modules in sequence to create quality notifications and update catalog details:(create and modify FM need extra wait time)

  • BAPI_QNOTIFICAT_CREATE
  • BAPI_QUALNOT_MODIFY_DATA
  • BAPI_QUALNOT_SAVE
  • BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT

entry.title: About cloudready type when creating an adaptation project
entry.content:
Hi All, I'm expanding the standard 'manage purchase orders' app.

When creating an Adaptation Project, what is the application condition that the project type is cloudReady?

I want to create the Manage Purchase Orders application as an Adaptation Project, but it doesn't appear in the list because the type is not cloudready.

 

I originally thought that if the app type was sap s/4hana cloud, it was in a cloudready state. However, this app did not appear on the available list.

Is this app not actually working? Or is there something I need to configure?

 

Please help. thanks.

entry.title: "Executing a Batch Input Session --> Error: 'LEAVE TO TRANSACTION' is not allowed in Batch Input."
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have the following problem: I created a recording of my report using the SHDB transaction. Based on this, I created a report that, simply put, saves the corresponding records when changes are made (e.g., the description is changed), clicks the back button, and processes the next record that was entered in the selection screen.

Now, the report works quite well, but when the first record is processed and it moves to the next record by clicking the back button, I receive the error: "Error: 'LEAVE TO TRANSACTION' is not allowed in Batch Input." I have tried many things, but nothing has brought the desired success. My goal is to be able to run the report, which creates a batch input session, in the background. Unfortunately, this is currently failing.

Here is the code of my report:

REPORT z_autosave.

TABLES: /opl09/anl_sts, /opl09/fa_vorrat.

CONSTANTS: lc_transaction TYPE tstc-tcode VALUE '/OPL09/INVENTUR'.

DATA: BEGIN OF bdcdata OCCURS 1000.
        INCLUDE STRUCTURE bdcdata.
DATA: END OF bdcdata.
DATA: ls_bdcdata TYPE bdcdata.

SELECT-OPTIONS: s_melnr FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-melnr,
                s_satza FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-satza,
                s_datum FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-datum,
                s_bukrs FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-bukrs OBLIGATORY,
                s_anln1 FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-anln1,
                s_anln2 FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-anln2,
                s_icon FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-icon OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '@09@',   "@08@ = green, @09@ = yellow, @0A@ = red
                s_frgsts FOR /opl09/anl_sts-frg_sts OBLIGATORY DEFAULT 'NRE'. "NRE = not relevant (for workflow)

PARAMETERS: p_group TYPE apqi-groupid DEFAULT 'OPAL_AUTO'.




START-OF-SELECTION.

  AUTHORITY-CHECK OBJECT 'F_BKPF_BUK'
    ID 'BUKRS' DUMMY "FIELD p_bukrs    <----- TO BE CHANGED LATER
    ID 'ACTVT' FIELD '01'.
  IF sy-subrc NE 0.
    MESSAGE e112(fg). "WITH p_bukrs.    <----- TO BE CHANGED LATER
  ENDIF.

  SELECT v~melnr, v~anln1, v~anln2 FROM /opl09/fa_vorrat AS v JOIN /opl09/anl_sts AS s
    ON v~melnr = s~melnr
    AND s~frg_step IS INITIAL
    AND s~frg_def IS INITIAL

    WHERE v~melnr IN @s_melnr
    AND v~satza IN @s_satza
    AND v~datum IN @s_datum
    AND v~bukrs IN @s_bukrs
    AND v~anln1 IN @s_anln1
    AND v~anln2 IN @s_anln2
    AND v~icon IN @s_icon
    AND s~frg_sts IN @s_frgsts

    INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_items).

  DATA: lv_count TYPE i VALUE 0.


** Öffnen der Arbeitsmappe
  CALL FUNCTION 'BDC_OPEN_GROUP'
    EXPORTING
      client = sy-mandt
      group  = p_group
      user   = sy-uname
      keep   = 'X'.

  LOOP AT lt_items ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_item>).

    " Zähler erhöhen
    lv_count = lv_count + 1.

    "Choose Process work list on main screen
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_INVENTUR' '1000'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE'
                                     '=ARBVO'.

    " fill selection screen for process work list
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_ANLAGEN_ARBVOR' '1000'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'S_MELNR-LOW'
                                     <fs_item>-melnr.      " Registration number
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=ONLI'.

    " click on save
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_ANLAGEN_ARBVOR' '0100'.
*    PERFORM bdc_field  USING 'S_ANLN1' <fs_item>-anln1.
*    PERFORM bdc_field  USING 'S_ANLN2' <fs_item>-anln2.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=SAVE'.

    " confirm popup
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING 'SAPLSPO1' '0500'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=YES'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_SUBSCR'
                                     'SAPLSPO1                                0501SUBSCREEN'.

*    " Additional pop-up confirmations can be added here
*    " Example for another pop-up
*    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING 'SAPLSPO1' '0500'.
*    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=YES'.

*    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_ANLAGEN_ARBVOR' '0100'.
*    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE'
*                                     '=/EBACK'.







    CALL FUNCTION 'BDC_INSERT'
      EXPORTING
        tcode     = lc_transaction
      TABLES
        dynprotab = bdcdata.

    CLEAR bdcdata[].

  ENDLOOP.



** Schließen der Arbeitsmappe
  CALL FUNCTION 'BDC_CLOSE_GROUP'
    EXCEPTIONS
      not_open    = 1
      queue_error = 2
      OTHERS      = 3.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'closing batch input session failed' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.

  CLEAR bdcdata[].

  " Ausgabe der Anzahl der verarbeiteten Datensätze
  WRITE: / 'Number of processed records:', lv_count.
  WRITE: / 'Batch input session successfully created.'.


*--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*                              FORMS                                 *
*                              -----                                 *
*--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Form BDC_DYNPRO                                                    *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Hilfsroutine zum Anlegen der Dynprobefehle                         *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&  -->  program = Programmanme des Dynpro                            *
*&  -->  dynpro  = Dynpronummer                                       *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
FORM bdc_dynpro USING program dynpro.

  CLEAR ls_bdcdata.
  ls_bdcdata-program  = program.
  ls_bdcdata-dynpro   = dynpro.
  ls_bdcdata-dynbegin = 'X'.
  APPEND ls_bdcdata TO bdcdata.

ENDFORM.                    "bdc_dynpro
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Form BDC_FIELD                                                     *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Hilfsroutine zum Anlegen der Dynprobefehle                         *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&  -->  fnam = Feldname                                              *
*&  -->  fval = Feldwert                                              *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
FORM bdc_field USING fnam fval.

  CLEAR ls_bdcdata.
  ls_bdcdata-fnam     = fnam.
  ls_bdcdata-fval     = fval.
  APPEND ls_bdcdata TO bdcdata.

ENDFORM.

Here is the recording of my report.



I would really appreciate your help, as I am getting a bit frustrated.

Best regards,
Alex

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow activation by Purchase Requisition document type.
entry.content:
Dear, we do checked the  'Scenario based workflow' flag of document type, but don't find the config item like below at all, without this config item, still can't active the flexible workflow.
Our customer's SP version is S4CORE  102, could you help to check if this SP version support the flexible workflow?   If not, which is the minimum version can support?
Many thanks!

entry.title: "Executing a Batch Input Session --> Error: 'LEAVE TO TRANSACTION' is not allowed in Batch Input."
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have the following problem: I created a recording of my report using the SHDB transaction. Based on this, I created a report that, simply put, saves the corresponding records when changes are made (e.g., the description is changed), clicks the back button, and processes the next record that was entered in the selection screen.

Now, the report works quite well, but when the first record is processed and it moves to the next record by clicking the back button, I receive the error: "Error: 'LEAVE TO TRANSACTION' is not allowed in Batch Input." I have tried many things, but nothing has brought the desired success. My goal is to be able to run the report, which creates a batch input session, in the background. Unfortunately, this is currently failing.

Here is the code of my report:

REPORT z_autosave.

TABLES: /opl09/anl_sts, /opl09/fa_vorrat.

CONSTANTS: lc_transaction TYPE tstc-tcode VALUE '/OPL09/INVENTUR'.

DATA: BEGIN OF bdcdata OCCURS 1000.
        INCLUDE STRUCTURE bdcdata.
DATA: END OF bdcdata.
DATA: ls_bdcdata TYPE bdcdata.

SELECT-OPTIONS: s_melnr FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-melnr,
                s_satza FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-satza,
                s_datum FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-datum,
                s_bukrs FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-bukrs OBLIGATORY,
                s_anln1 FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-anln1,
                s_anln2 FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-anln2,
                s_icon FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-icon OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '@09@',   "@08@ = green, @ = yellow, @0A@ = red
                s_frgsts FOR /opl09/anl_sts-frg_sts OBLIGATORY DEFAULT 'NRE'. "NRE = not relevant (for workflow)

PARAMETERS: p_group TYPE apqi-groupid DEFAULT 'OPAL_AUTO'.




START-OF-SELECTION.

  AUTHORITY-CHECK OBJECT 'F_BKPF_BUK'
    ID 'BUKRS' DUMMY "FIELD p_bukrs    <----- TO BE CHANGED LATER
    ID 'ACTVT' FIELD '01'.
  IF sy-subrc NE 0.
    MESSAGE e112(fg). "WITH p_bukrs.    <----- TO BE CHANGED LATER
  ENDIF.

  SELECT v~melnr, v~anln1, v~anln2 FROM /opl09/fa_vorrat AS v JOIN /opl09/anl_sts AS s
    ON v~melnr = s~melnr
    AND s~frg_step IS INITIAL
    AND s~frg_def IS INITIAL

    WHERE v~melnr IN @s_melnr
    AND v~satza IN @s_satza
    AND v~datum IN @s_datum
    AND v~bukrs IN @s_bukrs
    AND v~anln1 IN @s_anln1
    AND v~anln2 IN @s_anln2
    AND v~icon IN @s_icon
    AND s~frg_sts IN @s_frgsts

    INTO TABLE (lt_items).

  DATA: lv_count TYPE i VALUE 0.


** Öffnen der Arbeitsmappe
  CALL FUNCTION 'BDC_OPEN_GROUP'
    EXPORTING
      client = sy-mandt
      group  = p_group
      user   = sy-uname
      keep   = 'X'.

  LOOP AT lt_items ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_item>).

    " Zähler erhöhen
    lv_count = lv_count + 1.

    "Choose Process work list on main screen
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_INVENTUR' '1000'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE'
                                     '=ARBVO'.

    " fill selection screen for process work list
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_ANLAGEN_ARBVOR' '1000'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'S_MELNR-LOW'
                                     <fs_item>-melnr.      " Registration number
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=ONLI'.

    " click on save
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_ANLAGEN_ARBVOR' '0100'.
*    PERFORM bdc_field  USING 'S_ANLN1' <fs_item>-anln1.
*    PERFORM bdc_field  USING 'S_ANLN2' <fs_item>-anln2.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=SAVE'.

    " confirm popup
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING 'SAPLSPO1' '0500'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=YES'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_SUBSCR'
                                     'SAPLSPO1                                0501SUBSCREEN'.

*    " Additional pop-up confirmations can be added here
*    " Example for another pop-up
*    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING 'SAPLSPO1' '0500'.
*    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=YES'.

*    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_ANLAGEN_ARBVOR' '0100'.
*    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE'
*                                     '=/EBACK'.







    CALL FUNCTION 'BDC_INSERT'
      EXPORTING
        tcode     = lc_transaction
      TABLES
        dynprotab = bdcdata.

    CLEAR bdcdata[].

  ENDLOOP.



** Schließen der Arbeitsmappe
  CALL FUNCTION 'BDC_CLOSE_GROUP'
    EXCEPTIONS
      not_open    = 1
      queue_error = 2
      OTHERS      = 3.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'closing batch input session failed' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.

  CLEAR bdcdata[].

  " Ausgabe der Anzahl der verarbeiteten Datensätze
  WRITE: / 'Number of processed records:', lv_count.
  WRITE: / 'Batch input session successfully created.'.


*--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*                              FORMS                                 *
*                              -----                                 *
*--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Form BDC_DYNPRO                                                    *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Hilfsroutine zum Anlegen der Dynprobefehle                         *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&  -->  program = Programmanme des Dynpro                            *
*&  -->  dynpro  = Dynpronummer                                       *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
FORM bdc_dynpro USING program dynpro.

  CLEAR ls_bdcdata.
  ls_bdcdata-program  = program.
  ls_bdcdata-dynpro   = dynpro.
  ls_bdcdata-dynbegin = 'X'.
  APPEND ls_bdcdata TO bdcdata.

ENDFORM.                    "bdc_dynpro
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Form BDC_FIELD                                                     *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Hilfsroutine zum Anlegen der Dynprobefehle                         *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&  -->  fnam = Feldname                                              *
*&  -->  fval = Feldwert                                              *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
FORM bdc_field USING fnam fval.

  CLEAR ls_bdcdata.
  ls_bdcdata-fnam     = fnam.
  ls_bdcdata-fval     = fval.
  APPEND ls_bdcdata TO bdcdata.

ENDFORM.

 

Here is the recording of my report.



I would really appreciate your help, as I am getting a bit frustrated.

Best regards,
Alex

Can i check that in c4c?

 

Thanks & regards,

Dhaval Solanki

entry.title: SAP RAP: Edit Button in the List Report
entry.content:
Hello Community,

normally, the Edit button is located in the top right corner of the object page. So you first have to go to the object page and then click the edit button.

Is it also possible to put the Edit button directly in the List Report? 

Like this:

regards,

Lars

entry.title: Re: How to Create And Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Cloud OData API Entities

When I refresh this page, It can't be saved in data.

entry.title: Re: Build your app (new UI)?
entry.content:
I have 2 of each in my free tier account

Maybe when creating the build config it marks it as used???

P.S.: Nice improvements being made around Build Apps ... looking for the next big redesign/update 🙂

entry.title: Re: Adobe PDF file generated from Spool opening
entry.content:
Sandra, I can generate it directly, but as there is standard program to generate PDF spool, am using that program. Only thing is, pdf file is generated and stored in the global directory, but the file open error is coming up. This statement,  

call 'RSPO_CACHE_CONTROL'    id 'AREA'        field 'ADSUTIL'
                                                     id 'OP'            field 'READFILE'
                                                     id 'BUFF'        field xbuffer
                                                     id 'BUFLEN'      field buflen
                                                     id 'FILENAME'    field pathname.
                                id 'POSITION'    field read_position
                                id 'READLEN'     field readlen
                                id 'RC'          field crc.

is giving result 'READLEN as 0', which is why I am getting the file open error.  Any resolution for this.

 

Rgds,

G.Khadeer Basha

entry.title: Re: how to disable retrofit transport request in sap
entry.content:
Hello Ravi, 

I am not sure about what you want to achieve, I mean it is you when creating a cycle the one who decides if there is a retrofit systems where the TRs created in maintance dev system should be retrofitted to the project dev system.

If you don´t have a project landscape, n+1 line, then your maintenance cycle does not require that you enter any retrofit system when creating the cycle... 

If you have a cycle with a retrofit system already define you could redefine the system and remove the retrofit system if there are not unretrofit transport requests.

Best regards,

Dolores

entry.title: RACI matrix
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I was wondering if SAP has got a RACI matrix template that follows the SAP Activate methodology? thank you

entry.title: Re: Post negative entries with GRDC
entry.content: [AmountInCompanyCodeCurrency]*-1

entry.title: Re: SAP JCo initializer error
entry.content:
If you have an issue, the first thing to do is always to check if you are using the latest JCo patch level.
Do you use JCo 3.1.10? And do you use SapMachine 17 (64-bit)?

entry.title: Re: scnId not valid in gameboard
entry.content: You need to add the ID "299" at the end and not your name: https://devrel-tools-prod-scn-badges-srv.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/devtoberfestContest/299

entry.title: Re: SAC support for BW Time- and Version-dependent hierarchies

Hi @ranto, 

Sorry for the real late reply. I did not get any notification about your comment. 

Do you still have the mentioned issues?

Best regards, 
Sajoscha

entry.title: Materialsmanagment - Fiori - HTTP 400
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we've recently upgraded to S4 FPS1. Since the Update we've been getting errors while navigating material managment (MM01/02/03). The error occurs sporadically so i'm having trouble finding the acctual issue.

Error: "A backend error caused an abort of the application, returning: HTTP 400".

We have no Z-programming implemented at this stage that might explain the issue.

Has anyone had a similary issue and can help me find a suloution?

Thanks

entry.title: MRSS V2000 Level 0006 on S/HANA - BAPI_ABSENCE_GETDETAILEDLIST obsolete
entry.content:
Hello together

Our company recently migrated to S4. In ECC we used BAPI_ABSENCE_GETDETAILEDLIST with an custom program to delete absence/availabilities on PA61 before we update with new HR-Data every night. 

Route -> HR-Application->SAP-PA61->MRSS

 

The Problem: BAPI_ABSENCE_GETDETAILEDLIST is obsolete on S4 and we don`t know which BAPI we can use instead to identify the absences/availabilities. 

Help is much appreciated. 

Thanks 

Stepcke

entry.title: Custom field can't be save in table
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

First, I maintain the custom field and save it.

( I already add custom fields and enable all cds views / odata service.)

When I refresh this page, It can't be save in table.

What's the next step I should do to map the custom field in tables?

 

Best regards,

Eric

entry.title: Re: #COE#BUMA - How to disable SAP system notifications f...
entry.content:
Hi Dave, 

Please find my reply below.

1.Which RPA Tool Are You Using? 

Answer : Power Automate Desktop.

2.How Are the Notifications Delivered? Are the notifications you're receiving pop-up messages within the SAP GUI, email notifications, or something else?

Answer: We are on public cloud, and we are receiving Pop-up messages.

3.When Do These Notifications Occur? Do these notifications appear at specific times or during particular transactions or processes?

Answer: These Notifications are generated from SAP side to provide feedback on the product, so we are not aware about the frequency of the notifications.

4.Have You Tried Any Suppression Methods?Have you attempted any methods to suppress these notifications, such as modifying user parameters or changing system settings?

Answer: No

5.Impact on Processes:How critical is it to suppress these notifications immediately? Is it causing process failures, delays, or data inconsistencies?

Answer: We don't have an option to supress these notifications as these are generated from SAP. Out BOT executes few applications and downloads data to backend. if during download BOT receives one of these notifications then it fails. 

6.Configuration of BOT User.Is the BOT user configured differently from a regular user in terms of authorizations or system settings? or Special configurations might help in fine-tuning system behavior for the BOT.

Answer: Configured same as regular user. 

***Potential Solutions Based on General Use Cases:

  • Suppressing SAP GUI Messages: Answer: We are on public cloud. 
  • Use SAP GUI scripting to capture and dismiss unwanted pop-ups. Answer: We are on public cloud.
  • Running in Background Mode: Answer: Download reports in the background are not suitable for RPA
  • Ensure your BOT processes are scheduled as background jobs, minimizing the chance of encountering interactive prompts. Answer: Download reports in the background are not suitable for RPA

Let me know if you need further information.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
1. Preview the App showing all the columns, search and filter options in the CDS view entity.App_preview
  2. Search records based on a specific value from 'Description' field and select an available value from the 'Status' field. search_and_filter

entry.title: Re: Custom CSS for component based UI Integration Cards

entry.title: Re: DMS: Scan and attach document
entry.content:
Experts,

Can you please let me know the feasibility to directly scan a document from a scanner tray and upload to DMS? 

I understand that if the above approach is not feasible, then I have to ask the users to first scan the file and save it to their desktop. And then as a second step, upload the document from their desktop to DMS. 

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: Re: Build your app (new UI)?
entry.content:
For others who haven't see it:

  • Here's is the What's New item about new build UI: https://help.sap.com/whats-new/cf0cb2cb149647329b5d02aa96303f56?locale=en-US&Component=SAP%20Build%20Apps%3BSAP%20Build%20Process%20Automation%3BSAP%20Build%20Work%20Zone,%20advanced%20edition%3BSAP%20Build%20Work%20Zone,%20standard%20edition&lastSent=2024-08-22
  • Here's the full Build Service documentation: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/build-and-deploy-web-applications?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: F4 help for custom application job
entry.content:
Hi Michael,

Thanks for the Reply.

Regards,
Bharath

entry.title: How do I maintain 2 hyperlinks in the email templates for SES approval specific to QAS and PROD
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

We have a requirement to set up mail notifications for the approvers of the SES workflow. The E-mail template should also consists of a hyperlink directing the approver to the 'My inbox application'.

We've set up the template with the hyperlink to the 'My Inbox' app in QAS for testing purpose. The test results are as expected but now we want to move this change to the Production server via "Import/Export software collection".

Our concern is that the transportation will move the same link to the QAS server in production as well. But we want to have two sets of links in QAS and PROD in the mail templates specific to the environment. Can you please recommend the best practice on how to go about doing this?

Thank you.

Best regards,

Rishav.

entry.title: Re: how to inject the clientId/secret to OAuth2UserTokenE...
entry.content: Sorry but your set-up is a bit complex to just understand from screenshots. Is there a reason why your project is split over 2 mta's and 2 xsuaa's? I'd suggest to simplify your approach, so the things work out-of-the-box. You should only have 1 xs-app.json because your project only has a single entry point which is your approuter: this will direct traffic either to /odata (destination) or to /app (ui) or to the login if there is no session. So all 'routes' should be defined in the approuter folder.

entry.title: Real Talk with Claire | Application Development & Automation Track Lead
entry.content:
Hello, SAP Community members 👋 I am Ching Wei (Claire) Tseng, a Product Manager at SAP Build. Originally from Taiwan, I studied at Mannheim University in Germany, earning my master’s degree in 2018 before joining SAP. In my free time, I enjoy cooking Taiwanese, Japanese, and Italian dishes. I’m also an avid traveler and museum enthusiast. 

In the Application Development and Automation (ADA) track of TechEd 2024, you can harness the power of SAP Build—a suite of low-code and pro-code solutions powered by generative AI—to accelerate application development, automation, and business site creation. Explore the latest innovations in ABAP, Build Code, and SAP Build for low-code to extend your ERP system while keeping the core clean!

What inspired you to specialize in this track?

We cover a wide range of topics, including SAP Build Process Automation, SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Work Zone, ABAP, SAPUI5, SAP Build Code, Enterprise Automation with SAP, SAP Mobile Services and more. I’m excited to collaborate with so many outstanding speakers and product managers. Stay tuned, as we will be announcing numerous new features and great news at TechEd!

How does this track embody the ‘where ideas get real’ spirit?

Our exceptional speakers will showcase various practical demos during the lectures, allowing you to learn how to apply our products and solutions in real business scenarios and enhance enterprise performance.

In AD181 jump-start session, you can gain comprehensive knowledge of full-stack development, process automation, and business site creation with SAP Build. In another jump-start session AD180, you’ll learn how to develop transactional SAP Fiori apps in the ABAP Cloud model using the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model, enhanced by generative AI.

Track stars (sessions to keep on your radar)

  1. AD110 Accelerate development with the latest AI capabilities in SAP Build: Experience the power of Joule copilot in SAP Build solutions to accelerate your development process.
  2. AD104 SAP Build Code: AI development and new service integrations with CAP: Examine new capabilities of SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) in SAP Build Code, and experience how Joule copilot can speed up your extension development.
  3.  AD105 Enhance your fusion team collaboration with ABAP Cloud and SAP Build: Discover how you can use the graphical modeler in the development environment of SAP Build Code for the ABAP Cloud development model and how your ABAP Cloud projects can be integrated into the lobby of SAP Build solutions.
  4. AD109 Experience the next level of Enterprise Automation with SAP: Explore the latest enhancements using SAP Build solutions, SAP Integration Suite, and SAP Signavio solutions together.
  5. AD103 Extend your SAP solutions with custom mobile apps using SAP Build Code: Learn to transform your user experience with SAP Mobile Services and AI capabilities in SAP Build Code.

Most important of all, you can’t miss out on our intro session: AD100 Unlock SAP Build and ABAP Cloud interoperability to elevate your extensions. Discover a new approach to building extensions while keeping your core clean and learn how SAP Build solutions and the ABAP Cloud development model work together to foster fusion development!

What should be in everyone’s TechEd toolkit for 2024?

  • Laptop, Pad or phone 📱: As TechEd is 100% virtual this year, you can join TechEd easily any place!
  • Curiosity and an Open Mind 💡: TechEd is a great opportunity to learn and explore new technologies, come ready to engage with SAP experts and absorb as much as you can!
  • Agenda 📆: Pre-plan your interested sessions and keynotes to maximize your time.

Don't miss out! Explore the TechEd 2024 session catalog and ensure your favorite ADA track sessions are on your list. We're excited to connect with you at the upcoming TechEd sessions, where you can tap into the full potential of SAP BTP with both pro-code and low-code extensibility options.

entry.content:

i am trying to use method SET_AXIS_POSITION to add free char. to row, but i don't know how to deal with the parameter i_r_parameter, could you show me how you achieve it? thank you.

BR,

Yue

entry.content:
It is possible, but only with an enhancement.

2667292 - How to manipulate external mail in MM output - SAP ERP & SAP S/4 HANA - SAP for Me

And then as a second step, upload the document from their desktop to DMS. Thanks Bharath

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 dynamic routes and targets

entry.title: CDS --profile hybrid
entry.content:
I have used the cds bind command to hybrid test my application.

When I launch my application with `cds watch --profile hybrid` everything works fine and I connect to the HANA Database. When I try using `cds run --profile hybrid` or `cds serve --profile hybrid` the application still runs but I just connect to a local sqlite.

Has anyone tried using --profile hybrid with run or serve and managed to get it to work?

Any help is appreciated.
